about_page_title: Mayelana ne-bitcoin.rocks — Imfundo ye-Bitcoin Kusukela ngo-2022
about_description: bitcoin.rocks ingwebhusayithi yamahhala, evulekile yemfundo ye-Bitcoin eyasungulwa ngo-2022. Umgomo wethu ukusheshisa ukwamukelwa kwe-Bitcoin ngemfundo.
about_mission_1: bitcoin.rocks yasungulwa ngo-2022 ngomgomo olula: ukusheshisa ukwamukelwa kwe-Bitcoin ngemfundo.
about_mission_2: Sikhona ukuze sibe yisixhumanisi sokuqala osabelana ngaso nomuntu onothando lwe-Bitcoin. Indawo yokuqala enobungane, efinyeleleka echaza ukuthi i-Bitcoin yakha kanjani umhlaba ongcono.
about_mission_3: Abantu abaningi kakhulu abaqondi i-Bitcoin noma abakaze bathulwe ngendlela efanele kuyo. Sifuna ukushintsha lokho ngokunikeza okuqukethwe kwemfundo kwekhwalithi ephezulu kwamahhala okungaqondwa yinoma ubani.
about_what_we_do_1: Sakha okuqukethwe kwemfundo kwamahhala kwabaqalayo be-Bitcoin. Iwebhusayithi yethu ithinta izihloko ezifana nokwenyuka kwentengo, ukuzigcinela, izikhwama zemali, i-Lightning Network, nokuthi i-Bitcoin iqhathaniswa kanjani nempahla yezezimali enye nezinhlelo zokukhokha.
about_what_we_do_2c: emnyango wakho ukuze usize ukukhulisa ukuqwashisa nge-Bitcoin emphakathini wakho. Amakhulu abantu askena amakhodi e-QR kule zitika nyanga zonke ukuze bafunde nge-Bitcoin.
about_what_we_do_3e: kunoma ubani ofuna ukusiza ukuletha amabhizinisi endawo ukuba amukele izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin.
about_what_we_do_4: Konke okuqukethwe kwethu kuthatha ngokuthi awunalo ulwazi lwangaphambili lwe-Bitcoin. Noma ungabe umusha ku-Bitcoin noma ungum-Bitcoiner osemnkantshubomvu ofuna izinsizakalo zokwabelana, i-bitcoin.rocks ingeyakho.
about_editorial_1: Yonke into equkethwe ku-bitcoin.rocks ikhethwe futhi ihlolwe ukuthi iqinisile. Lapho sibhekisa kudatha noma ezibalo, sicaphuna imithombo yethu ukuze uziqinisekisele ulwazi ngokwakho.
about_editorial_2: Sixhumanisa nemithombo ethembekile efana ne-TIME Magazine, Forbes, MIT Technology Review, Lyn Alden, nabanye abaningi. Sikholelwa ukuthi i-Bitcoin izikhulumela yona uma amaqiniso ethulwa ngokucacile.
about_editorial_3: Okuqukethwe kwethu kubuyekezwa futhi kubuyekezwe njalo ukuqinisekisa ukunemba nobuntsha. Konke okuqukethwe kugxile kuphela emfundweni ye-Bitcoin.
about_open_source_1a: bitcoin.rocks iphrojekthi yamahhala, evulekile enelayisensi ngaphansi kwe-MIT License. Yonke ikhodi yethu itholakala emphakathini
about_open_source_2: Noma ubani angafaka isandla ku-bitcoin.rocks. Samukela ikakhulukazi abahumushi abasiza ukwenza okuqukethwe kwethu kufinyeleleke kubantu emhlabeni wonke.
about_open_source_3: Ngokubonga umphakathi wethu wabahumushi abazithandela, i-bitcoin.rocks okwamanje itholakala ngezilimi ezingu-25 futhi iyakhula.
about_contact_1: Singathanda ukuzwa kuwe. Noma unombuzo, isiphakamiso, noma ufuna nje ukuthi sawubona, thintana nathi noma nini.
